title: chenopodium pumilio f. glandulosum
intro: Chenopodium pumilio f. glandulosum is a variety of the Chenopodium pumilio plant, also known as a type of goosefoot, which is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Chenopodium pumilio f. glandulosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams for skin and wound care.
